name: Opportunity
fact: Mars Exploration Rover B — the marathon rover. 5,352 sols on the surface (almost 15 years), 45.16 km traversed (the most by any vehicle on another world until Curiosity broke the cumulative record). Confirmed past liquid water at Endurance, Victoria, and Endeavour craters. Final transmission during the 2018 global dust storm: "my battery is low and it's getting dark."
capability: Set the bar for rover endurance; established the field-geology playbook every subsequent rover has followed.
